name: smart-leads
description: Professional Lead Management Dashboard with Analytics

scripts.dev: concurrently "cd frontend && pnpm run dev" "cd backend && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd frontend && pnpm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd frontend && pnpm run lint" "cd backend && npm run lint || true"
scripts.db:seed: cd backend && npm run seed || echo "No seed script configured"
